{{Quote|Captain Salaban. I was glad to hear you'd been promoted off ''Battle Dog''.|Wedge Antilles to Geng Salaban|<ref name="X-wing: Starfighters of Adumar" />}}
'''Geng Salaban''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and commander of the [[Quasar Fire-class cruiser-carrier/Legends|''Quasar Fire''-class bulk cruiser]] ''[[Battle Dog]]'', which served in Group Two of the [[Solo Fleet]] during the [[Hunt for Zsinj|hunt]] for [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]. Later, Salaban was given the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Allegiance (Imperial I-class)|''Allegiance'']] as his command.

As commander of the ''Allegiance'', he escorted [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Red Flight]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]] to negotiate the planet's entry into the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Salaban and his crew remained neutral during the brief [[Adumari Civil War|civil war]] due to [[New Republic Intelligence Service|Intelligence]] Sector Head [[Tomer Darpen/Legends|Tomer Darpen's]] comm blackout order. After the formation of the [[Adumari Union]], Salaban participated in the [[Battle of Adumar]] against the [[Imperial Remnant]].
